_sourcing_note: Official brand and government sites (loves.com, locations.pilotflyingj.com, catscale.com, ta-petro.com, choicehotels.com, dot.state.al.us/ALEA, iexitapp.com, en.wikipedia.org) were blocked at the organization egress gateway (403 CONNECT denials confirmed via the agent-proxy status endpoint) and could not be fetched directly. Per instructions, official brand/store URLs that appeared verbatim in search results are recorded as canonical websites, and every facility below is corroborated by 2+ independent search sources (brand store listing + freight directories such as truckstopsandservices.com, allstays.com, findtruckservice.com, 4roadservice.com). No field was guessed; conflicting or unconfirmed values were left blank.

listings.name: Pilot Travel Center #602
listings.description: Full-service Pilot/Flying J travel center at I-65 Exit 264 (Daniel Payne Dr / SR-94) on the north Birmingham approach. Listings report 12 diesel lanes, roughly 157 public plus 46 prime/reserved truck parking spaces, 12 showers, on-site CAT Scale, DEF lanes, laundry, driver's lounge, ATM, and EV charging. Open 24 hours. Truck-space count left blank because reported figures mix public/prime counts.
listings.corroboration: Pilot official store page + locations.pilotflyingj.com + truckstopsandservices (Flying J Travel Center #602, I-65 Exit 264) + TruckMap + Yelp all agree on brand, address 224 Daniel Payne Dr Birmingham 35207, exit 264, and CAT Scale presence.

listings.name: CAT Scale - Pilot Travel Center #602, Birmingham
listings.description: CAT Scale located at Pilot Travel Center #602, I-65 Exit 264, north Birmingham approach.
listings.corroboration: Pilot #602 amenity list (via locations.pilotflyingj.com and truckstopsandservices) explicitly includes CAT Scale; corroborated by allstays Alabama CAT Scale directory. CAT Scale official locator (catscale.com) was blocked at the egress gateway.

listings.name: Petro Dodge City (Petro Stopping Center #397)
listings.description: Large locally-owned Petro (TravelCenters of America) truck stop at I-65 Exit 299 (AL-69) in the Dodge City / Hanceville area, Cullman County. Reported amenities: ~10 diesel lanes, 10 private showers, on-site CAT Scale, TA Truck Service center with repair bays, Iron Skillet restaurant plus Burger King/Popeyes/Dunkin/Baskin-Robbins, laundry, driver's lounge, dog wash. Open 24 hours. Reported parking figures vary (~312-322 spaces) so truck-space count left blank.
listings.corroboration: TA/Petro official location page + operator site dodgecitypetro.com + truckstopsandservices (Petro Stopping Center #397, I-65 Exit 299) + 4RoadService + Yelp agree on brand, 426 AL-69 S Hanceville 35077, exit 299, CAT Scale and TA Truck Service on site.

listings.name: CAT Scale - Petro Dodge City, Hanceville
listings.description: CAT Scale located at Petro Dodge City (Petro Stopping Center #397), I-65 Exit 299, Cullman County.
listings.corroboration: Petro Dodge City amenity list (TA/Petro page + truckstopsandservices) includes CAT Scale; independent references note a CAT Scale at I-65 Exit 299 (Cullman). CAT Scale official locator was blocked at the egress gateway.

listings.name: TA Truck Service - Petro Dodge City
listings.description: TA Truck Service center co-located at Petro Dodge City, I-65 Exit 299. On-site heavy-truck maintenance and repair bays (reported ~6 service bays). Separate service facility from the host travel-center listing.
listings.corroboration: TA/Petro location page and truckstopsandservices both list an on-site TA Truck Service center with repair bays; corroborated by 4RoadService provider listing for Petro Dodge City.

listings.name: Pilot Travel Center #1550
listings.description: Pilot travel center at I-65 Exit 304 (Good Hope / Cullman). Listings report 8 diesel lanes, roughly 70-72 public plus ~14 prime truck parking spaces, 6 showers, on-site CAT Scale, Wendy's, Dunkin' Donuts Express, ATM, EV chargers. Open 24 hours. Truck-space count left blank due to source variance (70 vs 72).
listings.corroboration: Pilot official store page + locations.pilotflyingj.com + truckstopsandservices (Pilot Travel Center #1550, I-65 Exit 304) agree on brand, 1600 County Road 437 Good Hope 35055, exit 304, phone 256-255-5638. (Note: exit 304 is at the northern edge of this segment; may overlap an adjacent Cullman segment.)

listings.name: CAT Scale - Pilot Travel Center #1550, Good Hope
listings.description: CAT Scale located at Pilot Travel Center #1550, I-65 Exit 304, Good Hope / Cullman.
listings.corroboration: allstays Alabama CAT Scale directory and Pilot #1550 amenity listings both indicate a CAT Scale at I-65 Exit 304 (Good Hope/Cullman), same address and phone as Pilot #1550. CAT Scale official locator was blocked at the egress gateway.

listings.name: Comfort Inn & Suites Fultondale Gardendale I-65
listings.description: Comfort Inn & Suites off I-65 in Fultondale (north Birmingham approach). Listed on truck-friendly lodging directories as offering truck/large-vehicle parking. Truck-space count and lot type not independently confirmed, so left blank.
listings.corroboration: Choice Hotels brand page confirms the hotel identity/address (1733 Fulton Road, Fultondale 35068); allstays 'Alabama hotels with truck parking' map and truckstopsandservices 'Motels With Truck Parking' directory both list it as truck-parking lodging. Exact exit number and truck-space count not confirmed, so left blank.

listings.name: Cullman County Rest Area (I-65 MM 300)
listings.description: Bidirectional ALDOT rest area on I-65 near mile marker 300 (Cullman County), with separate truck and car parking, restrooms, water, picnic tables, and RV dump station. Reported ~10 combined semi/RV spaces. Existence and truck access are corroborated across rest-area directories, but LEGAL overnight-parking status could not be confirmed from an official ALDOT source (only user reviews claim overnight is tolerated), and ALDOT's site was blocked at the egress gateway. Held pending official confirmation.
listings.hold_reason: Facility existence and truck access are corroborated (MM 300, bidirectional), but legal overnight-parking status is not confirmed by an official ALDOT source (only user-review claims), and ALDOT (dot.state.al.us) was blocked at the egress gateway. Do not assume overnight parking is permitted.
listings.corroboration: Multiple rest-area directories (alabamarestareas.com, restareasnearme.com, parkadvisor.com) agree on a bidirectional I-65 rest area at ~MM 300-301 in Cullman County with separate truck parking. Overnight legality unverified.

excluded.name: Sunoco (510 US Highway 31, Warrior)
excluded.reason: Gas/convenience station at I-65 Exit 284 area; no confirmed truck parking or truck-stop facilities. Not a freight facility.

excluded.name: Shell / Finley Blvd truck stop (1901 Finley Blvd)
excluded.reason: I-65 Exit 262B, south of this segment's range (belongs to the Birmingham segment); sources also indicate no overnight truck parking.

excluded.name: Firestone Complete Auto Care (1105 Main St)
excluded.reason: Passenger/light-vehicle auto and tire shop; not a heavy-truck / semi tire service and not directly serving I-65 freight traffic.

excluded.name: Warrior Tire & Auto
excluded.reason: Passenger auto repair and tire shop; not a confirmed heavy-truck tire/roadside service off an I-65 exit.

excluded.name: Truck stop at I-65 Exit 275 (Kimberly/Morris/Mount Olive)
excluded.reason: No truck stop exists; Exit 275 confirmed to have gas/restaurants only, no dedicated truck facility.
